title: Too Many Bricks
description: Created for Knarfy's video on the subject! This mod adds way too many bricks to the game...
body:
# Knarfy Presents: Too Many Bricks
![TOO MANY BRICKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xPdA2vRT/images/bbd429c9cb6f26ce9fc5ae79152ab0a351990239.png)

**This mod adds WAY too many bricks to Minecraft.**

Because of the release of the new "Resin Bricks" this mod aims to add far too many more to the game on top of that. From simple stone bricks, to living bricks that attack you, to brick armor and a brick sword, this mod is completely dumb and has no reason to really exist. Would you expect anything else from Knarfy?

**Check out the original video with more information here:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YDsY_0gOf5U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features:
### Items:
- Stone Brick 
- Deepslate Brick
- Red Nether Brick
- Diamond Brick
- Emerald Brick
- Lapis Brick
- Dirt Brick
- Mud Brick
- Edible Brick
- Throwable Brick
- TNT Brick
- Slime Brick
- Hyper Realistic Brick
- Cinder Block
- Brick Armor
- Bucket of Brick
- Coin
- Super Mushroom
- Living Brick Spawn Egg
- Brickolas Cage Spawn Egg

### Blocks:
- Diamond Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Emerald Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Lapis Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Netherite Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Iron Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Gold Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Copper Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Dirt Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Edible Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- TNT Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Slime Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Hyper Realistic Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Cinder Block Bricks
- Lego Bricks (2x2, 2x1, & 1x1)
- Power Brick
- Wall Plug
- Mario Bricks & Mystery Block
- Briquid
- Brickdonalds Table
- Infested Bricks
- Brick Blocks with Textures from Past Updates

### Misc:
- Re-creates the resin blocks from Minecraft 1.21.4
- Adds Living Brick Mob
- Adds Brickolas Cage Mob
- Possibly more things I can't remember!
